title: Expected Threat (xT) value surface — Karun Singh canonical grid
description: Karun Singh's canonical 12x8 Expected-Threat grid (open_xt_12x8_v1), bilinearly interpolated to a smooth surface (like his blog viz), attacking left-to-right. Climbs toward the opponent goal, peaking at the central goal-mouth (0.2574); falls off toward the wings even at the goal line. Values are Singh's published grid, not computed here.
